_comment: Committed demo cards so every domain surface renders on a fresh install. The linkedin_post demo cards intentionally use Geoff's public professional persona (name + headline as they appear on LinkedIn) so the preview looks real; no private data (emails, credentials, contact info) anywhere. Domains with a real source (board_store/ledger_missions) do not read this file.

linkedin_post.author_headline: Founder, World Model Sports · Applied AI + basketball analytics
linkedin_post.hook: Most NBA contract models price the player. The good ones price the fit.
linkedin_post.body:
Most NBA contract models price the player. The good ones price the fit.

We rebuilt our surplus-value model to condition on roster context:
- archetype overlap with the current rotation
- lineup pockets the player actually unlocks
- age-curve risk priced against the contract years, not the season

The result: two players with identical BPM can differ by $18M in modeled value to the SAME team.

Fit is the asset. The player is just the carrier.

linkedin_post.hook: Lineup data says who played together. Graph data says who actually fit.
linkedin_post.body:
Lineup data says who played together. Graph data says who actually fit.

Our network view treats every lineup as a small graph: players are nodes, possessions are edges, and chemistry shows up as edge weight that survives opponent adjustment.

Three things it caught last season that raw on/off missed are in the thread.

book.title: Thinking in Bets
book.author: Annie Duke
book.notes: Resulting = judging a decision by its outcome. Ch. 4 maps cleanly onto judge calibration: separate decision quality from variance before scoring the router.

paper.title: Scaling Laws for Reward Model Overoptimization
paper.abstract: Studies how optimizing against a learned reward model degrades true performance as optimization pressure increases, and characterizes the divergence as a function of policy/RM scale.
paper.notes: Directly motivates the anti-Goodhart checks in the improvement loop: hold out a sealed eval the optimizer never sees.
figures: fig2: proxy vs gold reward divergence

machine_upkeep.notes: Rotating gateway.log verified bounded; Ollama + LiteLLM + Ledger answering.
